Comment.MultiLanguageText: Active cycle mode: 0=None, 1=ABCDE, 2=Palletizing, 3=Manual. Derived each scan from the 3 GDB_*Cmd.bo_Mode bits (set by HMI/operator). PLC mutex contract: only one mode may have Start succeed at a time. HMI may bind this to a banner text/lamp.

Mode-routed current step. activeMode=1: mirrors GDB_MachineCmd.i16_AutoStep (0,10..50). activeMode=2: mirrors GDB_PalletizingCmd.i16_PalletStep (0..48). activeMode=3: 0 (manual has no step). activeMode=0: 0.
Total steps in active cycle: 5 (ABCDE), 48 (Palletizing), 0 (Manual/None). HMI uses for progress-bar / "Step N of M" display.

Current TCP target X (mm), mode-routed. ABCDE: instFB_AutoCtrl_ABCDE.statTargetPos.x. Palletizing: instFB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing.statTargetPos.x. Manual/None: holds last value (no overwrite, so HMI sees last commanded target).
Current TCP target Y (mm), mode-routed. See target_x.
Current TCP target Z (mm), mode-routed. See target_x.
Current TCP target A wrist (deg), mode-routed. See target_x.
Group: all 4 joints powered. Mirror of GDB_Control.axesEnabled.
Group: all 4 joints homed. Mirror of GDB_Control.axesHomed.
Group: any joint error. Mirror of GDB_Control.axesError.
Group: enabled AND homed AND NOT error. Mirror of GDB_Control.axesReady (derived in FB_AxisCtrl rev 1.3).
J1 base shoulder: ready / powered. Mirror of GDB_ManualStatus.bo_J1_Enabled (which mirrors instFB_AxisCtrl.instPower_J1.Status).
J1: homed (mirror of J1_SCARA_Arm3D.StatusWord.%X5 via GDB_ManualStatus).
J1: fault active.
J1: motion in progress (NOT standstill).
J1 actual position (degrees, base shoulder rotation). Read direct from J1_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition.
J1 actual velocity (deg/s).

J2 elbow actual rotation (degrees). NOTE: J2 is at kinematic-group index A[3] per the deliberate misorder — see PLC_HANDOFF_2026-05-18_J2J3DeliberateMisorder.md. This field reads from J2_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition directly (joint-name convention, no swap needed here).
J3 Z prismatic actual position (mm). NOTE: J3 is at kinematic-group index A[2] per the deliberate misorder. This field reads from J3_SCARA_Arm3D.ActualPosition (joint-name convention).
J4 wrist actual rotation (degrees).
Safety: E-Stop chain healthy (mirror of GDB_MachineCmd.bo_ESTOP_LOCK). TRUE=OK, FALSE=E-Stop active.
Aggregate alarm: GDB_MachineCmd.bo_Alarm OR GDB_PalletizingCmd.bo_Alarm. HMI binds a single lamp to this for "any alarm" indication.
ABCDE 5-point path is initialized (mirror of GDB_MachineCmd.bo_PathInitialed). Required gate before ABCDE Start.
Palletizing 16-box 4-layer path is initialized (mirror of GDB_PalletizingCmd.bo_PalletInitialed). Required gate before Palletizing Start.

Diagnostic: MC_SetTool(ToolNumber=1) has been activated on ScaraArm3D (mirror of instFB_AxisCtrl.statToolActivated). FALSE → MC_MoveLinearAbsolute returns UserFault (motionFBStatus=0x8001). FB_AxisCtrl rev 1.2+ auto-fires SetTool once after axesEnabled goes TRUE.

AttributeList.Text: Phase 2.4 (C71, 2026-05-18) — Read-only HMI facade. Consolidates ~35 display tags from across the system (GDB_Control, GDB_ManualStatus, GDB_MachineCmd, GDB_PalletizingCmd, instFB_AutoCtrl_ABCDE iDB, instFB_AutoCtrl_Palletizing iDB, J{n}_SCARA_Arm3D TOs, instFB_AxisCtrl iDB) into a single GDB for HMI to bind to. FB_HMIStatusMirror updates this each OB1 scan via active-mode routing logic. Writes (HMI → bo_Mode/bo_Start/etc.) stay direct to the per-mode cmd DBs — this GDB is read-only from HMI's perspective.
